Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 21st, 2005 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
Video Release: February 21st, 2006 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: R for sequences involving sexual harassment including violence and dialogue, and for language.
Running Time: 123 minutes
Plot point: Whistleblowers
Subgenre: Courtroom / Legal Drama
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Participant Media, Warner Bros.
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
